query: what does morgage mean? I don't speak english so well. I want to know before I walk in
response:
Great question! A *mortgage* is a loan that helps you buy a house or other property. 

Here's how it works: Chase lends you money to purchase the home, and you pay it back over many years (usually 15-30 years) with monthly payments. The house itself serves as security for the loan.

Chase offers several mortgage types:
• *Home purchase loans* - for buying a house
• *Refinancing* - replacing your current mortgage with a new one
• *HELOC* (Home Equity Line of Credit) - borrowing against your home's value
• *Jumbo loans* - for expensive homes
• *FHA/VA loans* - government-backed loans with special benefits

When you visit the branch, they can explain everything in detail and help you understand which option might work best for your situation! 🦕
